Manages heart rate monitor subscriptions, data processing, sensor control, and feature settings.


## Files
- **[hrm_manager.c](hrm_manager.c.md)**: Manages heart rate monitor (HRM) subscriptions, data processing, and sensor control for Pebble firmware.
- **[hrm_manager.h](hrm_manager.h.md)**: Manages heart rate monitor (HRM) subscriptions, data collection, and feature settings for applications.
- **[hrm_manager_private.h](hrm_manager_private.h.md)**: Private header for managing heart rate monitor subscriptions, callbacks, and sensor state in Pebble firmware.
